parameters.query:
SET app.current_tenant = '{{ $json.tenantId }}';
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.s3_prefix
FROM tenants t
WHERE t.id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid
  AND t.is_active = true
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM api_keys k
    WHERE k.tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid
      AND k.key_hash = encode(sha256('{{ $json.apiKey }}'::bytea), 'hex')
      AND k.is_active = true
      AND (k.expires_at IS NULL OR k.expires_at > NOW())
  )
LIMIT 1;

SET app.current_tenant = '{{ $('Input validieren').first().json.tenantId }}';

-- Source anlegen
WITH new_source AS (
  INSERT INTO sources (id, tenant_id, name, source_type, s3_key, s3_bucket, status)
  VALUES (
    gen_random_uuid(),
    '{{ $input.first().json.id }}'::uuid,
    '{{ $('Input validieren').first().json.name }}',
    '{{ $('Input validieren').first().json.sourceType }}',
    {{ $('Input validieren').first().json.s3Key ? '''' + $('Input validieren').first().json.s3Key + '''' : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $('Input validieren').first().json.s3Bucket ? '''' + $('Input validieren').first().json.s3Bucket + '''' : 'NULL' }},
    'processing'
  )
  RETURNING id
),
-- Document anlegen
new_doc AS (
  INSERT INTO documents (id, source_id, tenant_id, content)
  SELECT gen_random_uuid(), s.id, '{{ $input.first().json.id }}'::uuid,
         '{{ $('Input validieren').first().json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  FROM new_source s
  RETURNING id, source_id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM new_source) AS source_id,
  (SELECT id FROM new_doc) AS document_id,
  '{{ $input.first().json.id }}' AS tenant_id,
  '{{ $input.first().json.name }}' AS tenant_name;

SET app.current_tenant = '{{ $json.tenantId }}';
WITH new_chunk AS (
  INSERT INTO chunks (id, document_id, tenant_id, content, chunk_index, token_count)
  VALUES (
    gen_random_uuid(),
    '{{ $json.documentId }}'::uuid,
    '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid,
    '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.chunkIndex }},
    {{ $json.tokenCount }}
  )
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO embeddings (chunk_id, tenant_id, embedding, model_name)
SELECT id, '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.vectorStr }}'::vector(1024), 'qwen3-embedding:0.6b'
FROM new_chunk
RETURNING chunk_id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, source_id: $('Ergebnisse sammeln').first().json.sourceId, document_id: $('Ergebnisse sammeln').first().json.documentId, chunks_created: $('Ergebnisse sammeln').first().json.chunksCreated, model: 'qwen3-embedding:0.6b', timing_ms: Date.now() - $('Input validieren').first().json.startedAt }) }}
